items.title: Sourcetable – AI Spreadsheet and Data Platform
items.summary: Sourcetable introduces an AI-powered spreadsheet and data platform designed to simplify data management and analysis.

items.title: Innate (YC F24) – Home robots as easy to program as AI agents
items.summary: Innate aims to make home robots more accessible by allowing users to program them as easily as AI agents.

items.title: IndexCache: Accelerating Sparse Attention via Cross-Layer Index Reuse
items.summary: This paper proposes IndexCache, a novel method to significantly accelerate sparse attention mechanisms in LLMs by reusing indices across layers.

items.title: Dropbase AI – A Prompt-Based Python Web App Builder
items.summary: Dropbase AI provides a prompt-based system for building Python web applications, streamlining development for users.

items.title: Vellum (YC W23) – Dev Platform for LLM Apps
items.summary: Vellum offers a development platform specifically designed to help engineers build and deploy applications powered by large language models.

items.title: Inkeep (YC W23) – Copilot for Support (think Cursor for help desks)
items.summary: Inkeep introduces an AI copilot for support teams, aiming to enhance help desk efficiency and user assistance.

items.title: Spatial-TTT: Streaming Visual-based Spatial Intelligence with Test-Time Training
items.summary: This research introduces a method for real-time visual-based spatial intelligence that continuously adapts through test-time training.

items.title: Strategic Navigation or Stochastic Search? How Agents and Humans Reason Over Document Collections
items.summary: This research investigates the reasoning strategies employed by both AI agents and humans when navigating and searching through document collections.

items.title: Video-Based Reward Modeling for Computer-Use Agents
items.summary: Researchers present a method for training computer-use agents using video-based reward modeling, improving their ability to learn from demonstrations.

items.title: ShotVerse: Advancing Cinematic Camera Control for Text-Driven Multi-Shot Video Creation
items.summary: ShotVerse introduces a framework for generating multi-shot videos from text prompts with advanced cinematic camera control.

items.title: DreamVideo-Omni: Omni-Motion Controlled Multi-Subject Video Customization with Latent Identity Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: DreamVideo-Omni enables highly customizable multi-subject video generation with precise motion control and identity preservation using latent identity reinforcement learning.

items.title: Dedalus Labs (YC S25) – Vercel for Agents
items.summary: Dedalus Labs aims to provide a Vercel-like platform for AI agents, simplifying their deployment and management.

items.title: Hyperbrowser MCP Server – Connect AI agents to the web through browsers
items.summary: Hyperbrowser MCP Server enables AI agents to interact with the web by connecting them through browser environments.

items.title: Trust Your Critic: Robust Reward Modeling and Reinforcement Learning for Faithful Image Editing and Generation
items.summary: This paper proposes a robust reward modeling and reinforcement learning approach to achieve more faithful and high-quality image editing and generation.

items.title: XSkill: Continual Learning from Experience and Skills in Multimodal Agents
items.summary: XSkill presents a framework for multimodal agents to achieve continual learning by integrating new experiences and skills over time.
